subtitle: Experience exceptional dining and hospitality, delivered directly to your room.

extra_towels.title: Extra Towels
extra_towels.desc: Request additional towels to be delivered to your room.

food_delay.title: Food Delivery Delay
food_delay.desc: Report issues such as food delivery delays or missing food items.

key_card_issue.title: Key Card Issue
key_card_issue.desc: Request help if your room key card is not working or needs replacement.

late_checkout.title: Late Checkout Request
late_checkout.desc: Request approval for late check-out. Subject to availability.

laundry.title: Laundry
laundry.desc: Request laundry service for clothes. Please mention quantity and any special instructions.

maintenance_ac.title: AC – Not Cooling
maintenance_ac.desc: Report air conditioning issues such as room not cooling or heating properly.

maintenance_electric.title: Electrical Issue
maintenance_electric.desc: Report electrical issues like lights not working, power outage, or faulty switches.

maintenance_plumbing.title: Bathroom / Plumbing Issue
maintenance_plumbing.desc: Report plumbing issues like water leakage, clogged drains, or low water pressure.

missing_cutlery.title: Missing Cutlery
missing_cutlery.desc: Request missing plates, cutlery, or serving items.

room_cleaning.title: Room Cleaning
room_cleaning.desc: Request full cleaning of your room. You may mention preferred timing or instructions.

room_service.title: Room Service
room_service.desc: Request in-room dining service. Food ordering is handled in the dedicated menu.

turn_down_service.title: Turn Down Service
turn_down_service.desc: Evening housekeeping service including bed preparation and a light room refresh.

noItems: No items found matching your filters.
specialInstructionsPlaceholder: e.g. Less spicy, no onions, deliver after 9 PM...
serviceFallbackDesc: Request this service to your room.

alerts.stayMissing: Stay context missing. Please ensure you scanned a valid QR code.
alerts.orderPlaced: Request placed successfully! Kitchen will review shortly.
alerts.roomUnverified: We could not verify your room location. Please rescan your room QR code.
